name: G.O.D
overview: G.O.D Series is a thought-provoking, faith-driven drama that explores the tension between good and evil in everyday life. Through powerful storytelling, raw emotion, and spiritual undertones, the series challenges viewers to confront moral choices, identity, and the unseen battles that shape our decisions. Each episode offers a deeper look into the human experience, revealing how purpose, pain, and faith intersect in a world filled with both light and darkness.
